title: International trade union complaint to UK NCP about a UK bank
body: "The complaint has been brought to the UK National Contact Point (UK NCP) against a UK bank (‘the respondent’), by an international trade union (‘the complainant’).  Headquartered in Switzerland, the complainant is a global union federation, whose member organisations collectively represent more than 10 million workers in food, farm, and hotel sectors.  Publication dates     Document Date     Initial assessment 8 August 2025     "
